entries.claim_text: When Retrieval Doesn't Help: A Large-Scale Study of Biomedical RAG
entries.quoted_snippet: When Retrieval Doesn't Help: A Large-Scale Study of Biomedical RAG

entries.claim_text: BioNLP Workshop at ACL 2026
entries.quoted_snippet: accepted to BioNLP Workshop at ACL 2026
accepted to BioNLP Workshop at ACL 2026

entries.claim_text: Erfan Nourbakhsh, Rocky Slavin, Ke Yang, Anthony Rios
entries.quoted_snippet: Erfan Nourbakhsh, Rocky Slavin, Ke Yang

entries.claim_text: The University of Texas at San Antonio
entries.quoted_snippet: The University of Texas at San Antonio

entries.claim_text: https://github.com/erfan-nourbakhsh/BioMedicalRAG
entries.quoted_snippet: https://github.com/erfan-nourbakhsh/BioMedicalRAG

entries.claim_text: paper
entries.quoted_snippet: accepted to BioNLP Workshop at ACL 2026

entries.claim_text: 檢索能讓生醫 QA 準確率相對 chain-of-thought 提示最多提升達 18%
entries.quoted_snippet: improves biomedical QA accuracy by as much as 18\%

entries.claim_text: 大多聚焦在大型專有或 70B 級模型（GPT-3.5、GPT-4、Mixtral-8×7B、Llama2-70B）
entries.quoted_snippet: largely focused on large proprietary or 70B-scale models

entries.claim_text: 每一個實驗條件都是 (retriever, corpus, query dataset) 的三元組
entries.quoted_snippet: We compare four retrieval methods, BM25, TF-IDF, MedCPT, and Hybrid RRF

entries.claim_text: Qwen2.5-7B, Llama-3.1-8B, Mistral-7B, Llama-3.1-70B, Qwen2.5-72B
entries.quoted_snippet: five open-weight instruction-tuned models spanning 7B to 72B parameters

entries.claim_text: LLaMA-3.1-8B 不檢索時 ROUGE-L 為 21.65，換上 BioASQ/PubMed corpus 後跳到 27.43
entries.quoted_snippet: LLaMA-3.1-8B improves from 21.65 to 27.43 ROUGE-L

entries.claim_text: 相對 baseline 的最大檢索增益只剩 1.18 分
entries.quoted_snippet: the maximum retrieval benefit over no-retrieval is 1.18 points

entries.claim_text: 以最省事的 RRF（Reciprocal Rank Fusion）為例，它不需訓練，只把 BM25 與 MedCPT 兩份排序清單按名次融合
entries.quoted_snippet: combines the BM25 and MedCPT ranked lists using Reciprocal Rank Fusion

entries.claim_text: \frac{1}{k + r_i(d)}
entries.quoted_snippet: \frac{1}{k{+}r}

entries.claim_text: 它在封閉題準確率上也沒有系統性地贏過純詞彙的 BM25
entries.quoted_snippet: does not systematically outperform lexical BM25

entries.claim_text: 所有檢索條件都固定取 top-$k=5$ 篇文件接到提示詞前面
entries.quoted_snippet: we retrieve the top $k{=}5$ documents

entries.claim_text: open-ended ROUGE-L 平均對照，就能看到增益的量級
entries.quoted_snippet: the maximum retrieval benefit over no-retrieval is 1.18 points
13.06 baseline vs.\ 14.24 with BioASQ

entries.claim_text: Qwen2.5-72B 完全不檢索的 85.6，就已經比任何 7B 模型的最佳檢索設定高出超過 2 分
entries.quoted_snippet: exceeds the best retrieval configuration of any 7B model by over 2 points

entries.claim_text: Mistral-7B 從不檢索的 75.7 一路掉到各語料的 68.6–72.3
entries.quoted_snippet: Mistral-7B drops from 75.7 to 68.6--72.3

entries.claim_text: 用 LLM-as-a-judge 判斷檢索脈絡是否足以答題
entries.quoted_snippet: we use an LLM-as-a-judge framework to determine whether the retrieved context contains enough information

entries.claim_text: 挑出 100 題「所有檢索方法都取回了被判為相關脈絡」的題目來比
entries.quoted_snippet: select 100 questions where all retrieval methods retrieved context judged to be relevant
LLaMA3.1-70B improves substantially with BM25 retrieval
LLaMA3.1-70B decreases from 0.660 to 0.260 under BM25

entries.claim_text: 「取回正確證據」並不等於「用得到證據」
entries.quoted_snippet: retrieving relevant evidence alone is not enough to guarantee better performance

entries.claim_text: 只要在相關證據中再混入 20 篇無關文件
entries.quoted_snippet: When we add 20 unrelated documents to the retrieved evidence

entries.claim_text: 真正的瓶頸是模型「使用證據」的能力，而非「找到證據」的能力
entries.quoted_snippet: many models still struggle to correctly use and reason over the retrieved information

entries.claim_text: Open-ended ROUGE-L 隨 top-k
entries.quoted_snippet: ROUGE-L changes by less than 0.2 points between $k{=}5$ and $k{=}50$

entries.claim_text: open-ended ROUGE-L 在 $k=5$ 之後就進入平台
entries.quoted_snippet: performance reaches a plateau by $k{=}5$
Mistral-7B declines steadily after $k{=}3$, reaching 51.22\% at $k{\geq}25$

entries.claim_text: 封閉題準確率隨 top-k 的長條圖：Llama-3.1-8B 在 k=5 達 72.83% 後於 k>=25 下滑，Mistral-7B 自 k=3 起下滑至 k>=25 約 51.22%，Qwen2.5-7B 與 Llama-3.1-70B 在 k>=25 最佳
entries.quoted_snippet: LLaMA-3.1-8B peaks at $k{=}5$ (72.83\%) before declining, while Qwen2.5-7B and LLaMA-3.1-70B reach their best performance at $k{\geq}25$. Mistral-7B declines steadily after $k{=}3$, reaching 51.22\% at $k{\geq}25$

entries.claim_text: 其餘五個 open-ended 指標（BERTScore、METEOR、BLEU、ROUGE-2、ROUGE-1）隨 top-k 亦一致呈現平台，k=5 之後於任何指標任何模型皆無可量測增益
entries.quoted_snippet: additional passages beyond $k{=}5$ provide no measurable benefit in any metric for any model

entries.claim_text: 其餘五個 open-ended 指標也隨 top-k 一致呈現平台，k=5 之後在任何指標任何模型皆無可量測增益
entries.quoted_snippet: additional passages beyond $k{=}5$ provide no measurable benefit in any metric for any model

entries.claim_text: Open-ended ROUGE-L 隨 shot 數變化
entries.quoted_snippet: accuracy collapses from 82.89\% (1-shot) to 10.06\% (10-shot)

entries.claim_text: LLaMA-3.1-8B 的封閉題準確率從 82.89%（1-shot）崩到 10.06%（10-shot）
entries.quoted_snippet: accuracy collapses from 82.89\% (1-shot) to 10.06\% (10-shot)

entries.claim_text: 3-shot 是 open-ended 的甜蜜點
entries.quoted_snippet: 3-shot prompting is the sweet spot

entries.claim_text: n-gram 重疊本來就是弱訊號
entries.quoted_snippet: though our experiments do not directly measure evidence utilization or grounding

entries.claim_text: 當 corpus 與 reference 高度同源時，檢索到的摘要與標準答案會共享大量詞彙
entries.quoted_snippet: the BioASQ/PubMed corpus consistently provides the strongest lift

entries.claim_text: 這是一個合理但尚未被直接量測的推論，而非已被證實的因果
entries.quoted_snippet: current models, especially smaller ones, do not consistently make effective use of retrieved evidence

entries.claim_text: 全文沒有回報任何重複實驗的變異數或顯著性檢定
entries.quoted_snippet: greedy decoding and a maximum of 300 newly generated tokens

entries.claim_text: 正確的結論不是「生醫 RAG 沒用」
entries.quoted_snippet: do not include proprietary frontier systems

entries.claim_text: 也刻意不碰 adaptive retrieval、重排序、迭代檢索或任務特化 chunking
entries.quoted_snippet: does not explore more complex retrieval strategies such as adaptive retrieval, document re-ranking

entries.claim_text: BioASQ 這一欄裡最大的單點跳升落在 LLaMA-3.1-70B（21.93 → 28.98，+7.05）
LLaMA-3.1-8B | 0.410 (w/o RAG) | 0.580 (BM25 clean)
Mistral-7B | 0.460 (w/o RAG) | 0.510 (BM25 clean)
Qwen2.5-7B | 0.410 (w/o RAG) | 0.380 (BM25 clean)
Qwen2.5-72B | 0.380 (w/o RAG) | 0.350 (BM25 clean)
LLaMA-3.1-8B | 0.300 (BM25 noisy)
Mistral-7B | 0.310 (BM25 noisy)
Qwen2.5-7B | 0.310 (BM25 noisy)
Qwen2.5-72B | 0.250 (BM25 noisy)
